headline: Is PPG (PPG) Using Marine Data Tools to Quietly Reinvent Its Competitive Moat?
summary: In March 2026, PPG Industries launched PPG InsightsNav, a secure analytics platform that helps shipowners and operators standardize and analyze seastock coatings purchasing data for better planning and cost control across global fleets. By turning historically fragmented marine coatings records into real-time, interactive dashboards, the tool aims to uncover efficiency gains from optimized port selection and consolidated ordering across procurement and technical teams. We’ll now explore how...
